summary: Finalized 3-page Meta Resume structure with section-by-section specs, data source mapping, and tone guide
decisions: Page 1: Header + Bottom Line + What's Clear/Not Clear + Decision Matrix
Page 2: What You're Getting + Gaps + How They Think + Interview Questions + Candidate Context
Page 3: QFS + Evidence Matrix + GitHub Snapshot + Links + Critical Risks
What's Clear = INDEX (binary), What You're Getting = BODY (evidence) — no overlap
learnings: Separation of INDEX vs BODY prevents section overlap
Founder-facing tone requires explicit trade-offs and 'Not your candidate' scenarios
Every section must map to specific decomposed data files
